title: Surgeon Vacancy at Boehringer Ingelheim India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Boehringer Ingelheim India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Surgeon looking for your next big career move? Boehringer Ingelheim India in Lucknow offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Boehringer Ingelheim India:
Boehringer Ingelheim India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Boehringer Ingelheim India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
